text: Upon entering this space filled with glass and color, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The world I inhabit is one of observation—research, development, and innovation beckon me to contemplate the interplay between humanity and technology. This so-called R+D environment feels inviting yet expectant, charging the air with the promise of discovery. I feel awake, my thoughts keen to grasp at the ideas presented here, aware that I am both observer and participant in humanity’s perpetual pursuit of understanding.
